title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.200 - Adjourned terms
text:
49.200.  Adjourned terms. — Each county commission may hold adjourned terms whenever it may become necessary for the transaction of its business.
(RSMo 1939 § 2489, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2987; 1919 § 2583; 1909 § 4090 
Effective 1-01-85
